TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Yungciitupey = Ptasan btunux gaga mhiyug brah Cnankung , ida wada bqanan hangan tgtru knsmudal na Neycngpu hngkawas 77 da, wada ptasan paru bi dnyagan na sjiqan kraaw yayung Mtudu, kiya ka pusu bi ddaan elug musa alang eseisil. Hngkwasan Kwangsyu siida, Seejiq Cawtun Cyenhwacng ni Seryaw Kungsng Tungjunghwa ‚Ä¶dnii ga mdudug balay phiyug uda niqan ririh kkraagan nii, tduwa pplawa ka Seryawcwang ni alang Canghwa syen siida, duri ni mangal bnegay uuda pusu paru mdudul na Ukwangryang phiyug asu powsa kkraagan, phiyug ptasan btunux endaan nii. Bnatas dha patas nii ga msa " miyah tuhuy o saw bi tnsapah nanaq, saw bi eyyayung knbbragan dha, uxay pstuq mlutuc ka ptasan btunux, malu hangan o mseupu ddgiyaq ni qqsiya psrdax" msa ka kari, dungus bi sraan ni slhayan laqi hici.
S.PHON: = juŇč ¶iitup…ô = ptasan btunux gaga mńßijug b…ĺańß ¶nankuŇč , ida wada bqanan ńßaŇčan tgt…ĺu knsmudal na n…ô ¶Ňčpu ńßŇčkawas ** da, wada ptasan pa…ĺu bi dnjagan na s…üiqan k…ĺaaw jajuŇč mtudu, kija ka pusu bi ddaan …ôlug musa alaŇč …ôs…ôisil. ńßŇčkwasan kwaŇčsju siida, s…ô…ô…üiq ¶awtun ¶j…ônńßwa ¶Ňč ni s…ô…ĺjaw kuŇčsŇč tuŇč…üuŇčńßwa *dnii ga mdudug balaj pńßijug uda niqan …ĺi…ĺińß kk…ĺaagan nii, tduwa pplawa ka s…ô…ĺjaw ¶waŇč ni alaŇč ¶aŇčńßwa sj…ôn siida, du…ĺi ni maŇčal bn…ôgaj uuda pusu pa…ĺu mdudul na ukwaŇč…ĺjaŇč pńßijug asu powsa kk…ĺaagan, pńßijug ptasan btunux …ôndaan nii. bnatas dńßa patas nii ga msa " mijańß tuńßuj o saw bi tnsapańß nanaq, saw bi …ôjajuŇč knbb…ĺagan dńßa, uxaj pstuq mlutu ¶ ka ptasan btunux, malu ńßaŇčan o ms…ôupu ddgijaq ni qqsija ps…ĺdax" msa ka ka…ĺi, duŇčus bi s…ĺaan ni slńßajan laqi ńßi ¶i.
S.FORM: = Yungciitupey = Ptasan btunux gaga mhiyug brah Cnankung , ida wada bqanan hangan tgtru knsmudal na Neycngpu hngkawas 77 da, wada ptasan paru bi dnyagan na sjiqan kraaw yayung Mtudu, kiya ka pusu bi ddaan elug musa alang eseisil. Hngkwasan Kwangsyu siida, Seejiq Cawtun Cyenhwacng ni Seryaw Kungsng Tungjunghwa ‚Ä¶dnii ga mdudug balay phiyug uda niqan ririh kkraagan nii, tduwa pplawa ka Seryawcwang ni alang Canghwa syen siida, duri ni mangal bnegay uuda pusu paru mdudul na Ukwangryang phiyug asu powsa kkraagan, phiyug ptasan btunux endaan nii. Bnatas dha patas nii ga msa " miyah tuhuy o saw bi tnsapah nanaq, saw bi eyyayung knbbragan dha, uxay pstuq mlutuc ka ptasan btunux, malu hangan o mseupu ddgiyaq ni qqsiya psrdax" msa ka kari, dungus bi sraan ni slhayan laqi hici.
S.PHON: = juŇč ¶iitup…ô = ptasan btunux gaga mńßijug b…ĺańß ¶nankuŇč , ida wada bqanan ńßaŇčan tgt…ĺu knsmudal na n…ô ¶Ňčpu ńßŇčkawas ** da, wada ptasan pa…ĺu bi dnjagan na s…üiqan k…ĺaaw jajuŇč mtudu, kija ka pusu bi ddaan …ôlug musa alaŇč …ôs…ôisil. ńßŇčkwasan kwaŇčsju siida, s…ô…ô…üiq ¶awtun ¶j…ônńßwa ¶Ňč ni s…ô…ĺjaw kuŇčsŇč tuŇč…üuŇčńßwa *dnii ga mdudug balaj pńßijug uda niqan …ĺi…ĺińß kk…ĺaagan nii, tduwa pplawa ka s…ô…ĺjaw ¶waŇč ni alaŇč ¶aŇčńßwa sj…ôn siida, du…ĺi ni maŇčal bn…ôgaj uuda pusu pa…ĺu mdudul na ukwaŇč…ĺjaŇč pńßijug asu powsa kk…ĺaagan, pńßijug ptasan btunux …ôndaan nii. bnatas dńßa patas nii ga msa " mijańß tuńßuj o saw bi tnsapańß nanaq, saw bi …ôjajuŇč knbb…ĺagan dńßa, uxaj pstuq mlutu ¶ ka ptasan btunux, malu ńßaŇčan o ms…ôupu ddgijaq ni qqsija ps…ĺdax" msa ka ka…ĺi, duŇčus bi s…ĺaan ni slńßajan laqi ńßi ¶i.
